windows.label: Windows

primary.label: Installer (.exe)
primary.description: Recommended — creates Desktop & Start Menu shortcuts

alternate.label: Portable (.exe)
alternate.description: No install — run from any folder or USB drive

install: Download Enigma-Setup and run the installer.
If SmartScreen appears, choose “More info” → “Run anyway”.
Follow the wizard — Desktop shortcut is created automatically.
Launch Enigma from the Desktop or Start Menu.

macos.label: macOS
install: Download the .zip for your Mac (Apple Silicon or Intel).
Double-click the zip to extract, then drag Enigma.app into Applications.
First launch: right-click Enigma → Open if macOS blocks unknown apps.
If blocked: run xattr -cr /Applications/Enigma.app in Terminal, then open again.

linux.label: Linux
install: AppImage: chmod +x Enigma-*.AppImage && ./Enigma-*.AppImage
Debian/Ubuntu: sudo dpkg -i Enigma-*-linux-amd64.deb
Fedora: sudo dnf install ./Enigma-*-linux-x86_64.rpm
AppImage may need: sudo apt install libfuse2

ios.label: iOS & iPadOS
ios.note: Enigma is a desktop browser. A native iOS app is on the roadmap.
install: Not available yet on iPhone or iPad.
Use Enigma on Windows, macOS, or Linux today.
Bookmark this page for iOS updates.

android.label: Android
android.note: Android builds are planned. Desktop Enigma is available now.
install: Not available yet on Android.
Download Enigma for desktop in the meantime.

freebsd.label: FreeBSD / Unix
freebsd.note: Use the Linux AppImage via Linuxulator, or build from source.
install: Enable Linux binary compatibility on FreeBSD.
Download the Linux AppImage and run with Linuxulator.
Or clone the repo: npm install && npm run start:dev
